{%- extends 'pydata_sphinx_theme/layout.html' %} {% block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {% if pagename == 'index' %} {# Landing-only assets. Injected here (not in conf.py's html_css_files / html_js_files) so they don't ship on every doc page — landing.css is ~2k lines and pulls in Google Fonts, and landing.js wires interactions only the landing page uses. #} {# Tag the document so landing.css can target it without relying on `:has(.bd-landing)` (browsers without :has() would otherwise miss the page-level overrides and render the chrome twice). #} {# `` and `` are emitted by sphinxext-opengraph (see ogp_enable_meta_description in conf.py) using the `.. meta::` block in index.rst — don't duplicate them here. #} {% endif %} {% endblock %} {% block docs_body %} {# Intentionally no GTM
